role_duties.independent_evaluator: Separate process/state root; may read vault under capability
role_duties.owner: Codex owner; sole formal write/adopt/authority actor outside this package
role_duties.promptfoo_runner_operator: Enumerates public cases offline; no scorer/vault access
role_duties.real_generator_author: Future only; mints real hidden suites outside this package
role_duties.result_release_reviewer: Reviews sealed envelopes before any release decision
role_duties.seam_author: Build generic isolation machinery and synthetic fixtures only
role_duties.subject: Produces raw outputs from public cases only
role_duties.vault_custodian: Holds sealed vault; never co-process with subject/Promptfoo

same_suite_subject_rule: Eligible only if ExposureLedger proves no disqualifying exposure for that principal on the suite-bound exposure_subject_identity.
